torch_pattern: torch_index = torch_index.unsqueeze(-1).expand([N, W, C]); torch_output = torch.scatter(torch_input, dim=dim, index=torch_index, src=torch_source)

config_template.notes: TOSA scatter semantics: index tensor is rank-2 [N, W] and is implicitly unsqueezed/expanded across the channel dim C before the scatter; output shape/dtype match input.

applicability_notes: constraints: {'scatter_dim': 'fixed to dim=1 (TOSA W dimension); torch.scatter with other dims cannot be fused', 'index_rank': 'torch index must be expandable from [N, W] (i.e. produced by unsqueeze(-1).expand([N, W, C]))', 'output': 'output.shape == input.shape, output.dtype == input.dtype'}
